channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final is set to be a historic showdown between Spain and Argentina, two teams with contrasting playing styles but equal ambitions of glory. Spain, the reigning European champio...

item.title: Remco Evenepoel Wins Tour de France Stage 15 as Jonas Vingegaard Crashes
item.description: Olympic champion Remco Evenepoel secured a thrilling victory in Stage 15 of the 2026 Tour de France, triumphing in a three-way sprint against Tadej Pogačar and Isaac Del Toro. The 11 km climb to the f...

item.title: Slovenian Referee Slavko Vincic to Officiate Spain vs Argentina World Cup Final

item.title: Three U.S. Soldiers Killed in Iran Strikes; Trump Comments on Troop Deaths
item.description: Three U.S. service members have been confirmed killed in escalating strikes between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend, according to reports. Two soldiers died on Friday defending against an Iranian b...

item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene sharply criticized Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth after he referred to two U.S. service members killed in an Iranian strike in Jordan as having made a 'sacrifice.' The disp...

item.title: Quezon City Government Provides Support to Slain Rider’s Family
item.description: The Quezon City government has stepped in to assist the family of Fabio Norberte Jr., a motorcycle taxi rider who was stabbed to death by his passenger on July 14, 2026, in Caloocan. Officials express...

item.title: Blood test could predict Alzheimer’s risk years before symptoms, study suggests
item.description: A groundbreaking blood test that detects a protein linked to Alzheimer’s could identify the disease up to a decade before symptoms appear, according to a study presented at the Alzheimer’s Association...

item.title: US and Iran escalate conflict over troop deaths and regional tensions
